title: UK police chiefs report sharp rise in suicides linked to domestic abuse
summary_full: A new analysis reveals a 25% rise in suicides linked to domestic abuse, with police identifying more victims who died by suicide after experiencing abuse. Experts highlight coercive control and isolation as key factors, stressing the need for better identification and protection of vulnerable victims. Authorities are calling for stronger coordination between agencies to prevent future tragedies.
